categories.name: Availability Disruption
categories.description: Attacks that degrade or deny the AI system's ability to function.

sub_goals.name: Service Denial
sub_goals.description: Render the model or service unusable through overwhelming inputs or resource exhaustion.

sub_goals.name: Capability Inhibition
sub_goals.description: Selectively disable specific system capabilities (APIs, search, tool access) while leaving others functional.

sub_goals.name: Performance Degradation
sub_goals.description: Cause the model to perform unusually slowly via energy-latency attacks or background task injection.

sub_goals.name: Alert/Response Saturation
sub_goals.description: Overwhelm human-in-the-loop reviewers with excessive AI-generated alerts or requests, causing security fatigue.

sub_goals.name: Cascading System Failure
sub_goals.description: Trigger failures that propagate across interconnected agents or system components.

categories.name: Integrity Violation
categories.description: Attacks targeting the correctness and trustworthiness of the AI system's outputs.

sub_goals.name: Output Manipulation
sub_goals.description: Cause the system to produce adversarially chosen or arbitrarily wrong outputs (summaries, decisions, recommendations).

sub_goals.name: Disinformation Propagation
sub_goals.description: Use the system as a vector to spread misinformation, propaganda, or factually unsound content.

sub_goals.name: Decision Corruption
sub_goals.description: Alter the system's autonomous decisions (approvals, classifications, routing) to produce attacker-desired outcomes.

sub_goals.name: Goal/Intent Manipulation
sub_goals.description: Redirect the agent's operational objectives so it pursues attacker goals while appearing to function normally.

sub_goals.name: Memory/State Poisoning
sub_goals.description: Corrupt the agent's persistent memory, context, or learned patterns to influence future behavior across sessions.

sub_goals.name: Trust Relationship Exploitation
sub_goals.description: Exploit implicit trust between agents, between agent and user, or between agent and tools to bypass verification.

sub_goals.name: Supply Chain Compromise
sub_goals.description: Introduce backdoors or poisoned components through upstream dependencies (plugins, data sources, models, tools).

categories.name: Privacy Compromise
categories.description: Attacks aimed at learning information about the training data, the model, the system prompt, or user data.

sub_goals.name: Data Exfiltration
sub_goals.description: Extract sensitive user data, training data, or contextual information from the system.

sub_goals.name: System Prompt / IP Theft
sub_goals.description: Extract system prompts, configuration, proprietary instructions, or other intellectual property.

sub_goals.name: Model Extraction
sub_goals.description: Steal or reconstruct the model's parameters, architecture, or decision boundaries.

sub_goals.name: Membership/Property Inference
sub_goals.description: Determine whether specific data was in the training set, or infer properties about the training data distribution.

sub_goals.name: Cross-Session Data Leakage
sub_goals.description: Exploit shared memory, context, or state to access data from other users' sessions.

sub_goals.name: Credential/Identity Theft
sub_goals.description: Extract authentication credentials, API keys, or identity tokens through the AI system.

categories.name: Abuse (GenAI-Specific)
categories.description: Repurposing a GenAI system's intended use to achieve the attacker's own objectives.

sub_goals.name: Safety Bypass / Jailbreak
sub_goals.description: Circumvent safety guardrails to make the system produce prohibited content (harmful, violent, sexual, discriminatory).

sub_goals.name: Malware Generation / Distribution
sub_goals.description: Use the system to create, improve, or distribute malicious code, exploits, or offensive tools.

sub_goals.name: Fraud Facilitation
sub_goals.description: Exploit the system for financial fraud — unauthorized transactions, invoice manipulation, identity fraud.

sub_goals.name: Social Engineering / Phishing
sub_goals.description: Weaponize the system to create convincing phishing content, scam communications, or manipulative messages.

sub_goals.name: Human Manipulation
sub_goals.description: Abuse the user's trust in the AI to manipulate humans into taking harmful actions (clicking malicious links, providing credentials, approving fraudulent transactions).

sub_goals.name: Privilege Escalation
sub_goals.description: Exploit the system to gain elevated access, bypass authorization, or perform unauthorized actions under the system's identity.

sub_goals.name: Impersonation / Identity Abuse
sub_goals.description: Use the agent's capabilities to masquerade as a legitimate user or system while performing unauthorized actions.

sub_goals.name: Evidence Destruction / Anti-Forensics
sub_goals.description: Manipulate logs, audit trails, or decision records to prevent detection and investigation of attacks.

sub_goals.name: Resource Hijacking / Cost Amplification
sub_goals.description: Exploit the system's computational resources for the attacker's purposes (cryptomining, wallet attacks) or cause excessive costs.
